title: Collaborating with AI Agents: A Field Experiment on Teamwork, Productivity, and Performance

publisher.name: Ju (Johns Hopkins Carey) and Aral (MIT Sloan)

appliesTo: 2,234 participants, 11,024 ads produced on the Pairit platform
Metrics: task-oriented communication, delegation rate, output homogeneity

sections.title: Results: productivity and quality
sections.summary: Human-AI teams produced 50% more ads per worker, higher text quality, lower image quality (jagged frontier).

sections.title: Diversity collapse
sections.summary: Human-AI outputs more self-similar — relevant to agent deployment governance.

sections.title: Field experiment on X
sections.summary: ~5M impressions; text quality improves CTR, image quality improves CPC.
